caption: A football player for the Las Vegas Raiders is captured in a sequence of shots. He wears a white jersey with the number "98" in silver and black, a silver helmet featuring the Raiders logo, and white gloves. He stands against a blurred blue and white background that contains partially visible white letters, including "H" and "U". The player is facing forward, holding his right hand up with his fingers curled into a gesture. As the sequence progresses, his hand remains raised, but the angle of his fingers shifts slightly. His left arm remains at his side, revealing tattoos on his forearm. The camera focus remains tightly on the player from the waist up, while the background remains consistently out of focus throughout the clip.
